title: collinsia parviflora var. sparsiflora
intro: Collinsia parviflora var. sparsiflora, also known as the small-flowered collinsia or the sparsely-flowered collinsia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving congestion and coughs associated with respiratory issues. The health benefits of Collinsia parviflora var. sparsiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help soothe sore throats and reduce muscle tension. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
